products.fullName: UNI-T UTi260M Smartphone Thermal Imager (Android USB-C)
products.description: Pro-grade Android smartphone thermal camera module with 256x192 IR resolution and dual measurement modes for both elevated body temperature and industrial inspection. Plugs into Type-C, ships with a 1m extension cable.
products.source: manuals.plus + tufzen (uni-trend page is JS-rendered, returned empty on direct fetch)
products.notes: Specs cross-verified between official UNI-T product manual (via manuals.plus) and the UTi256M/UTi260M shared spec sheet. Image is from a reseller (Tufzen) - UNI-T's own thermal subdomain renders in JS so the official wp-content image URL could not be captured directly. The image-scraper agent should confirm/replace if a uni-trend.com CDN image is found.

products.fullName: UNI-T UTi89 Pro Handheld Thermal Imager
products.description: Compact handheld thermal camera aimed at HVAC, electrical, and DIY troubleshooting. IP65 rated with 2 m drop durability, 5 color palettes, and on-board 16 GB microSD storage.
products.source: Amazon listing + manuals.plus + ukobd2 (official thermal subdomain JS-rendered)
products.notes: Specs confirmed across Amazon, manuals.plus, and AliExpress listings - all consistent. Image URL is from a reseller; image-scraper should attempt to find a higher-res official UNI-T image.

products.fullName: UNI-T UTi165K Body Temperature Screening Thermal Imager
products.description: Tripod-mountable thermal camera dedicated to elevated body temperature (EBT) screening at 30 to 45 degC with +/-0.5 degC accuracy. Real-time PC software streaming with auto high-temp alarm makes it suitable for clinic, school, and entrance screening.
products.source: Multiple reseller listings + UNI-T Made-in-China page (official subdomain JS-rendered)
products.notes: The UTi165K is purpose-built for fever screening and is a different product family from the general UTi165A+ industrial imager - copy should not conflate them. Image is from a reseller; image-scraper should try to upgrade to an official UNI-T CDN image.

notFound.reason: No UNI-T product named 'TM1', 'UT-TM1', 'UTM1', or 'ThermalMaster TM1' was found across uni-trend.com, thermal.uni-trend.com, meters.uni-trend.com, uni-trendus.com (US store), uni-t-shop.eu (EU store), Kinmo PH, Amazon UNI-T storefront, or general Google. The closest match in name is 'Thermal Master P1' / 'P3' - but Thermal Master is a separate brand (thermalmaster.com), not a UNI-T product line. The 'TM1' SKU on the Kinmo invoice is most likely either: (a) Kinmo's internal SKU code, (b) a regionally branded Philippines-only variant, or (c) a typo. Recommend asking the user/Kinmo to share the product photo or barcode so we can identify the actual UNI-T model number.
searchAttempts: uni-trendus.com search: TM1 (returned only UTS-T01 antenna)
